location.office_time_required: flexibility across DoorDash office hubs to support close cross-functional collaboration

secondary_archetype: Growth PM (product experimentation / marketplace analytics focus)

level_signals: 4+ years of experience in strategy & operations, product ops, growth, or similar analytical role
Title is Senior Associate, consistent with mid-senior IC

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 4+ years of experience in strategy & operations, product ops, growth, or a similar analytical role within a marketplace or consumer technology environment.
must_haves.qualifier: within a marketplace or consumer technology environment

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You are deeply analytical, with strong SQL skills and hands-on experience designing, executing, and reading out A/B tests or experiments in a product context.
hands-on experience designing, executing, and reading out A/B tests or experiments in a product context.
You have a product sense — you understand product lifecycles, can QA a feature with a critical eye, and know how to translate data into recommendations.
You are comfortable working through ambiguity — defining metrics where none exist, scoping problems that aren't fully formed, and making progress with imperfect information.
You are a self-starter with a bias toward action who takes ownership of outcomes and thrives in fast-moving environments.
You are comfortable working with AI, leveraging tools like Cursor and Claude Code to multiply analytical output and drive measurable business outcomes.

scope.surface: DoubleDash marketplace — multi-vertical add-on and cross-sell ordering experiences, funnel optimization, and product experimentation within the US Marketplace organization
primary_metrics_inferred: Order volume / attach rate for DoubleDash add-ons
core_responsibilities: Identify and solve complex business problems by framing the right questions, analyzing data, and translating insights into clear recommendations and actions.
Own and build critical components of the DoubleDash experience, driving initiatives end-to-end from sizing and planning through launch and iteration.
Partner cross-functionally with Product, Pricing, Finance, Analytics, and Operations to align on priorities, navigate tradeoffs, and execute effectively.
Expand scope and impact over time by taking on new problem areas and contributing to high-visibility initiatives that shape DoorDash's marketplace strategy.
Pioneer the use of AI-powered tools and agentic workflows to accelerate analysis, automate reporting, and deliver step-change improvements in team throughput.

green_flags: Clear team mission and product surface described (DoubleDash multi-vertical growth)
High autonomy and ownership explicitly promised
AI tooling adoption is a stated priority, not just a nice-to-have
Comprehensive benefits package including 16 weeks paid parental leave, 401(k) with matching, medical/dental/vision
red_flags: Location is described vaguely as 'flexibility across DoorDash office hubs' — unclear whether fully remote or hybrid with office expectations
No visa sponsorship or work authorization information provided
No nice-to-haves listed — makes it harder to gauge degree of flexibility on requirements

National pay range ($87K-$128K) is relatively modest for the level of analytical and cross-functional ownership described; San Francisco or NYC cost-of-living may not be well compensated at lower end of band
Use of AI screening tool (Covey) noted only for NYC roles — may introduce bias concerns

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Senior Associate', reporting level, years requirement, and comp range)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated in JD)
location.remote_us_eligible (inferred from 'This role is based in the United States, with flexibility across DoorDash office hubs')
ambiguities: Location type is ambiguous: JD says 'based in the United States, with flexibility across DoorDash office hubs to support close cross-functional collaboration' — this could mean hybrid with office attendance expected or largely remote with occasional travel. Treated as hybrid.
No nice-to-haves are explicitly labeled in the JD; all requirements in the 'We're excited about you because' section are treated as hard must-haves given their unconditional framing.
AI tooling requirement (Cursor, Claude Code) is phrased as a must-have comfort level but could be interpreted as a nice-to-have given its novelty; treated as hard given unconditional bullet language.
